description_long: This object consists of a set of six spoons, each with a rounded bowl and a gently tapering handle. The spoons display a variety of finishes, including metallic gold, silver, and a darker, almost blackened metal, as well as a wood-textured appearance. The bowls of the spoons are shallow and oval-shaped, with some showing a slightly reflective surface and others appearing matte. The handles are slender, subtly curved, and end in a rounded tip, with some handles featuring a visible wood grain pattern. The overall design is utilitarian yet elegant, suitable for both casual and formal dining settings.
description: A set of six assorted spoons with metallic and wood-textured finishes, featuring rounded bowls and slender, curved handles.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the rounded bowls and the variety of finishes, including metallic and wood textures.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the shallow depth of the bowls and the gentle curve of the handles.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view displaying the undersides of the bowls and the full length of the handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view to view 1, showing the curvature of the handles and the different finishes on the spoons.
attribute_location: kitchen drawer, dining table, or restaurant setting
attribute_orientation: bowls facing upward, handles extending downward or to the side
attribute_contextual_placement: resting flat on a surface or nested with other utensils
attribute_proximity_to_other_objects: often placed next to forks and knives or stacked with similar spoons
